workflow.name: SMS_Delivery_REST
workflow.description: Input (XML) -> Validate -> Compose -> Send SMS (REST) -> Audit Log -> Route Success/Failure

module.name: Validate Phone + Consent
Send SMS (REST)
Audit Log
module.script:
def logPath = AUDIT_LOG_PATH
def ts = new Date().format("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") def maskedPhone = result.phone?.replaceAll(/\d(?=\d{4})/, "*")
def line = "${ts} | corr=${result.correlationId} | cust=${result.customerId} | phone=${maskedPhone} | ok=${result.ok} | http=${result.httpCode}\n" new File(logPath).getParentFile().mkdirs() new File(logPath) << line
return result
